# HEFHS Standard Issue Templates

Thank you for contributing to HEFHS! Please use the appropriate template below.

---

## 📋 General Issue

> For questions, discussions, or issues that don't fit other categories.

**Is this a question?** Yes/No

**Description:**
<!-- Describe your issue or question -->

**Additional context:**
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## 💡 Proposal: New Feature

> Proposing a new directory structure, naming convention, or other enhancement.

**Feature name:**
**Related section:** (e.g., Directory Structure, Naming Conventions, Framework Compatibility)

<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail -->

### Examples
```yaml
# Example implementation
```
